content.text:
[cron:3709e1d2-67b1-4eff-92e4-b586ec802978 空闲检测自主学习] 请检测当前是否有活跃对话（查询 sessions_list）。如果没有活跃对话（没有最近5分钟内的用户消息），则执行自主学习：

1. 搜索企业数字化转型、智能安防、网络系统集成、IT运维服务等道简网络相关行业的最新动态
2. 整理3-5条关键信息
3. 保存到 /home/gem/workspace/agent/workspace/memory/学习笔记.md

如果有活跃对话，直接回复"检测到活跃对话，不执行自主学习"
Current time: Sunday, March 29th, 2026 — 8:15 PM (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-03-29 12:15 UTC

content.thinking: This is a cron job task that checks for active conversations and performs autonomous learning if there are none. Let me first check the sessions_list to see if there are any active conversations in the last 5 minutes.

sessions.label: Cron: 空闲检测自主学习

content.thinking: This is a cron job task that checks for active conversations and performs autonomous learning if there are none. Let me first check the sessions_list to see if there are any active conversations in the last 5 minutes.

The only session in the last 5 minutes is the cron job session itself ("Cron: 空闲检测自主学习"). There are no other active user conversations. I should perform the autonomous learning task.

Let me search for the latest information about enterprise digital transformation, intelligent security, network system integration, and IT operations services - industries related to 道简网络 (Daojian Network).

content.text: 没有活跃对话，执行自主学习。开始搜索相关行业动态。

arguments.task: 搜索道简网络相关行业的最新动态：企业数字化转型、智能安防、网络系统集成、IT运维服务。请搜索最新信息，整理3-5条关键信息，包括：标题、来源、核心内容摘要。保存到 /home/gem/workspace/agent/workspace/memory/学习笔记.md

content.thinking: The subagent has been spawned to perform the learning task. Since it's an isolated run, it will complete autonomously and save the results. I don't need to wait for it - it will announce when done. Let me just acknowledge this task has been initiated.

content.text: 已启动自主学习子任务，将搜索企业数字化转型、智能安防、网络系统集成、IT运维服务等行业最新动态，整理后保存到学习笔记。任务完成后会自动通知。
